title: subscription-upgraded event — v1 wire contract
description: FROZEN wire shape for the `subscription::SubscriptionUpgraded` event. Emitted AFTER a plan swap to a higher tier commits. Distinct from `SubscriptionDowngraded` — the tier direction is meaningful for the entitlements sync + welcome-to-higher-tier notification flow. Every consumer reads this shape unchanged; breaking changes require a v2 per the versioning policy in `foundation/readme.md` §12.

x-versioning.policy: Same policy as tenant-provisioned.v1: additive changes stay in v1; breaking changes create v2 with parallel dispatch through a deprecation cycle.

subscription_id.description: The PlanSubscription primary key. NOT the Stripe / Paddle subscription ID — that lives on the model as `provider_subscription_id` and is intentionally excluded from this contract to keep the wire shape provider-agnostic.

from_plan_id.description: The plan the subscription upgraded FROM.

to_plan_id.description: The plan the subscription upgraded TO.

from_tier.description: Tier of the from-plan at upgrade time.

to_tier.description: Tier of the to-plan. MUST be higher than from_tier by the tier ordering; otherwise the emitting service would fire SubscriptionDowngraded instead.

billing_cycle.description: Billing cycle of the to-plan. Cycle changes fire this event too (e.g. monthly → annual on the same tier is treated as an upgrade).

effective_at.description: When the upgrade takes effect on entitlements + billing. Usually equals occurred_at but can be deferred to the next billing anniversary via `--effective-next-cycle`.

id.description: ULID of the actor. Null for `system`.

tenant.description: Denormalised tenant context so a webhook subscriber doesn't need to callback for basics.
